_comment: ECS Application Auto Scaling policy for cloudgraph-api. This is a reference document — apply via AWS Console or CLI, not Terraform.

scalableTarget._comment: Register the ECS service as a scalable target with Application Auto Scaling.

scalingPolicy._comment: Target Tracking Scaling Policy — automatically scales tasks to keep avg CPU at 60%.

TargetTrackingScalingPolicyConfiguration._targetComment: Keep average CPU across all running tasks at 60%. Scale out aggressively when spikes occur during bulk uploads, scale in conservatively to avoid thrashing.
TargetTrackingScalingPolicyConfiguration._scaleInComment: Wait 5 minutes before scaling in. Prevents premature task termination during bulk upload processing.
TargetTrackingScalingPolicyConfiguration._scaleOutComment: React quickly (60 seconds) to CPU spikes — important during concurrent bulk upload bursts.

cliCommands._comment: AWS CLI commands to apply this policy. Run AFTER deploying the ECS service.
cliCommands.putScalingPolicy: aws application-autoscaling put-scaling-policy --service-namespace ecs --resource-id service/YOUR_ECS_CLUSTER_NAME/YOUR_ECS_SERVICE_NAME --scalable-dimension ecs:service:DesiredCount --policy-name cloudgraph-api-cpu-target-tracking --policy-type TargetTrackingScaling --target-tracking-scaling-policy-configuration '{"TargetValue":60.0,"PredefinedMetricSpecification":{"PredefinedMetricType":"ECSServiceAverageCPUUtilization"},"ScaleInCooldown":300,"ScaleOutCooldown":60}'
